title: rubus × semipurpurascens
intro: Rubus × semipurpurascens, also known as the purple raspberry, is a hybrid plant of the Rubus genus, specifically a cross between the fragaria and rubus species. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. The purple raspberry has been used to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage, among other health benefits. Rubus × semipurpurascens is often prepared as a tea or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
